scripts.test:api: cd ../backend && (py -m unittest tests/test_api.py || python -m unittest tests/test_api.py || python3 -m unittest tests/test_api.py)
scripts.test:mock: cd ../backend && (py -m unittest tests/test_api_mock.py || python -m unittest tests/test_api_mock.py || python3 -m unittest tests/test_api_mock.py)
scripts.test:backend: cd ../backend && (py -m pytest tests/test_all_endpoints.py -v --tb=short -x || python -m pytest tests/test_all_endpoints.py -v --tb=short -x || python3 -m pytest tests/test_all_endpoints.py -v --tb=short -x)
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run lint
